basic_details.job_title: RCB Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: RCB Faridabad is recruiting 01 Project Associate II for research on ribosome hibernation as an anti-tuberculosis drug target. M.Sc. in Life Sciences with NET/DBT-JRF/GATE qualification and two years experience can apply.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: 34 Years as on 31.07.2026
qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in life sciences with NET/DBT-JRF/GATE or equivalent exam cleared. Minimum 60% marks in Masters or equivalent degree. Two years’ experience in R&D in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services.

selection_process: Selection will be based on the performance of the candidate in the online interview (hybrid mode). Shortlisted candidates will be informed by email on 27 July 2026. The interview will be held at 10:00 AM onwards on 28 July 2026.
how_to_apply: Interested candidates should apply online by 24 July 2026 before 05:00 PM through the link provided in the advertisement. Upload copies of the following documents:
M.Sc. mark sheet in Life Science/Biotechnology.
National Level NET/DBT-JRF/GATE or equivalent eligibility test certificate.
Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for the online interview.
important_instructions: The position is temporary and initially for one year. No TA/DA will be given for appearing in the interview. For any query, contact PI by email: [email protected]. The selected candidate should be motivated for a career in research.

content_sections.heading: Regional Centre for Biotechnology Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Regional Centre for Biotechnology invites applications for engagement of Project Associate II in the project on ribosome hibernation in Mycobacterium tuberculosis. The position is temporary and initially for one year.

content_sections.heading: Regional Centre for Biotechnology Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: RCB Faridabad is recruiting 01 Project Associate II for research on ribosome hibernation as an anti-tuberculosis drug target. M.Sc. in Life Sciences with NET/DBT-JRF/GATE qualification and two years experience can apply.

rows.regional_centre_for_biotechnology_rcb_fa: Exploring ribosome hibernation in Mycobacterium tuberculosis as a potential anti-tuberculosis drug target

content_sections.heading: Regional Centre for Biotechnology Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
Regional Centre for Biotechnology Project Associate II Vacancy Details 2026
Regional Centre for Biotechnology Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: M.Sc. in life sciences with NET/DBT-JRF/GATE or equivalent exam cleared. Minimum 60% marks in Masters or equivalent degree. Two years’ experience in R&D in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services.

Research experience in gene cloning, protein purification, ribosome purification, and cryo-electron microscopy. Good oral and written communication skills. A strong motivation for a career in research.

content_sections.heading: Regional Centre for Biotechnology Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
Regional Centre for Biotechnology Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on the performance of the candidate in the online interview (hybrid mode). Shortlisted candidates will be informed by email on 27 July 2026. The interview will be held at 10:00 AM onwards on 28 July 2026.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for RCB Project Associate II Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: M.Sc. mark sheet in Life Science/Biotechnology. National Level NET/DBT-JRF/GATE or equivalent eligibility test certificate. Peer-reviewed, published manuscript, if any. Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for the online interview.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for RCB Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The position is temporary and initially for one year. No TA/DA will be given for appearing in the interview. For any query, contact PI by email: [email protected] . The selected candidate should be motivated for a career in research.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RCB Project Associate II 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application is 24 July 2026 before 05:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many Project Associate II positions are available at RCB Faridabad?
faq.answer: There is 01 position available.

faq.question: Q3. What is the fellowship amount for Project Associate II at RCB?
faq.answer: Rs. 42,000/- + 27% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for RCB Project Associate II post?
faq.answer: M.Sc. in life sciences with NET/DBT-JRF/GATE or equivalent + two years R&D experience and minimum 60% marks

faq.question: Q5. What is the project title for the position at RCB?
faq.answer: “Exploring ribosome hibernation in Mycobacterium tuberculosis as a potential anti-tuberculosis drug target”.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for RCB Project Associate II vacancy?
faq.answer: Apply online through the link provided in the advertisement by 24 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. When is the online interview for RCB Project Associate II?
faq.answer: The online interview is on 28 July 2026 at 10:00 AM onwards (hybrid mode).

faq.question: Q8. What experience is desirable for the Project Associate II position?
faq.answer: Research experience in gene cloning, protein purification, ribosome purification, and cryo-electron microscopy.

faq.question: Q9. Is the Project Associate II position at RCB permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is temporary and initially for one year.

faq.question: Q10. Who is the Principal Investigator for the project at RCB?
faq.answer: Dr. Prem S. Kaushal, Associate Professor.
